+(10—20) to all Attributes
Lightning Resistance is unaffected by Area Penalties

Wraeclast Besieged Breach Precursor Tablet
Requires: Level 65
Adds an Otherworldy Breach to a Map
10 uses remaining
Breaches expand to at least 20 metres in radius
Breaches remain open while there are alive Breach Monsters
Breaches in Map have (-10—20)% reduced Monster density
map breach minimum monster power to not close [5]
Forgotten By Time Expedition Precursor Tablet
Requires: Level 65
Adds a Kalguuran Expedition to a Map
10 uses remaining
Expedition Monsters in your Maps spawn with half of their Life missing
Runic Monsters in your Maps are Duplicated
Clear Skies Delirium Precursor Tablet
Requires: Level 65
Adds a Mirror of Delirium to a Map
10 uses remaining
Delirium Fog in your Maps never dissipates
Delirium in Map increases (-10—10)% slower with distance from the mirror
Freedom of Faith Ritual Precursor Tablet
Requires: Level 65
Adds Ritual Altars to a Map
10 uses remaining
Favours at Ritual Altars in Area costs (10—15)% increased Tribute
Can Reroll Favours at Ritual Altars in your Maps twice as many times
The Grand Project Precursor Tablet
Requires: Level 65
Adds Irradiated to a Map
1 use remaining
Can only be applied to Precursor Tower Maps
Completing the Tower makes all nearby Maps accessible
Visions of Paradise Precursor Tablet
Requires: Level 65
Adds Irradiated to a Map
1 use remaining
If Map was not previously Irradiated, completing Map adds Irradiation instead
Season of the Hunt Overseer Precursor Tablet
Requires: Level 65
Empowers the Map Boss of a Map
10 uses remaining
Map Bosses are Hunted by Azmeri Spirits
Cruel Hegemony Overseer Precursor Tablet
Requires: Level 65
Empowers the Map Boss of a Map
10 uses remaining
Map Bosses have 1 additional Modifier
Unforeseen Consequences Abyss Precursor Tablet
Requires: Level 65
Adds Abysses to a Map
1 use remaining
% reduced Pack Size in Map
(4—6) additional Rare Monsters are spawned from Abysses in Map
Map contains (14—18) additional Abysses
Map is overrun by the Abyssal
% increased Quantity of Waystones found in Map
